stage_status_definitions.LIVE: A public provider receipt exists for this stage.
stage_status_definitions.BUILT_BUT_OFF: Local infrastructure exists, but activation, publication, or provider acceptance has not occurred.
stage_status_definitions.NOT_YET_EXISTING: The real-world object does not exist yet; local plumbing is not the object.
stage_status_definitions.OUT_OF_SCOPE_NOT_BUILT: This stage was deliberately excluded from the free-capture task.
stage_status_definitions.STRUCTURALLY_UNAVAILABLE: The operator has ruled the stage unavailable until a prerequisite product exists.
